In the days after the 9/11 attack on the United States, fear and anger gripped America. But for Frank Roque, it was motivation for killing an innocent immigrant chasing the American dream.
Timothy Ring and his crew planned the perfect crime, robbing an armored car outside a mall on one of America's busiest shopping days...but after the heist, they never planned how to get away with it.
A husband accused of stabbing and drowning his wife and mother of his children, claims he has no memory of the brutal murder, since he was sleepwalking at the time. But will a jury believe him?
Where is Baby Gabriel? At one point his mother claimed she killed him, and later said she gave the baby to a mysterious couple in Texas. But will we ever know what really happened?

The Matriarch Mastermind Murder. More than a decade after Florida State Law professor Dan Markel was gunned down by two Miami hitmen, his former mother-in-law, Donna Adelson, is accused.
Murdaugh Family Murders. Victim to Verdict with Ted Rowlands takes you inside the high-stakes trials that have captivated the true crime world. Hosted by Court TV's Ted Rowlands.
